zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Watkins於1525年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾維爾時，他的父親Humphrey Watkins25歲，母親Catherine Symonds23歲。他於大約1545年與Mary Coker在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年2月18日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾霍洛維爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Watkins于1525年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特霍爾維爾时，他的父亲Humphrey Watkins25岁，母亲Catherine Symonds23岁。他于大约1545年与Mary Coker在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年2月18日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾霍洛維爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Watkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Watkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watkin
meanings: English and Welsh: from the personal name Watkin, a diminutive of Walter .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. en.lifeSummary: When Richard Watkins was born in 1525, in Holwell, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Humphrey Watkins, was 25 and his mother, Catherine Symonds, was 23. He married Mary Coker about 1545, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 February 1589, in Hollowell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Il a épousé Mary Coker environ 1545, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 février 1589, à Hollowell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Watkins(이)가 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 홀웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Watkins(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Symonds(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Mary Coker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 2월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 홀로월에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Watkins родился в 1525 г. в местности холвелл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Humphrey Watkins было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Symonds, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Coker около 1545 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 февраля 1589 г. в местности холлоуелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
